---
title: "Sowing and Sewing: A Sexagesima Story. By Charlotte M. Yonge."
---

## Sowing and Sewing: A Sexagesima Story. By Charlotte M. Yonge.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1883
**Genre:** Fiction
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** Walter Smith (late Mozley), 34 King Street, Covent Garden, London.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
